title: Fix #3511: Nested default assignment for struct pattern
body:
Fix #3511

1. The new implementation guarantees default assignment using "default" or "type_default" in nested struct
2. Some refactoring has been done to reuse the code in different phases
3. Recursion is used when struct member is hit as a member and not yet matched
4. Modified the test case to hit the new implementation
5. Removed legacy comment in bison parser
